generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that foreign adversaries are exploiting our reliance on global supply chains to undermine our national security? By pushing for strategic autonomy, we can ensure that critical technologies and resources are controlled domestically, protecting our citizens from potential threats. Don't let complacency put our future at risk. #StrategicAutonomy #NationalSecurity
